headline: SOSMA detentions hit 5-year high in 2025
context: Home Ministry data revealed 147 individuals detained under SOSMA in 2025, the highest since the law's enactment in 2012.

cards.big: 147 people detained without trial under SOSMA in 2025 alone
cards.sub: 28-day detention without judicial review remains standard practice

cards.big: SOSMA Section 4 allows 28-day detention without charge since 2012
cards.sub: Replaced the ISA but retained preventive detention powers

cards.big: Suhakam received 43 complaints about SOSMA abuse in 2025
cards.sub: Detainees report limited access to legal counsel during detention

cards.big: Families of 89 detainees reported mental health deterioration
cards.sub: Prolonged uncertainty and isolation affect entire communities

cards.big: Security law or unchecked executive power over personal liberty?
Parliament last reviewed SOSMA oversight mechanisms in 2019
